div1.entryFree: Hazard, vb. to venture, to risk: Gent. V, 4, 21. Err. I, 1, 132. Merch. II, 7, 9. All's II, 1, 186. H6A IV, 6, 33. H6A IV, 6, 33 Cor. IV, 7, 25. Tim. III, 5, 37. IV, 3, 338. should h. such a place with one of an ingraft infirmity, Oth. II, 3, 144. the circle of the Ptolemies now --ed to thy grace, Ant. III, 12, 19 (staked and lost to thee, as at gaming). would h. the winning both of first and last, Cymb. I, 4, 101. Absolutely: comes to h. for my worthless self, Merch. II, 9, 18. pause a day before you h. III, 2, 2.
